_comment: Server-owned quest COMPLETION rewards, keyed by '<questId>:<stage>'. The client may request a claim but NEVER specifies the reward amount — the server grants only what is listed here, exactly once per (quest,stage) (docs/ECONOMY-AUTHORITY.md §2.1, closes M6 reward inflation). Seeded from the readable quest packs; intermediate quest item hand-outs (tuning_fork, mine_survey, etc.) are a documented follow-up and remain client-optimistic until enumerated here.
